name: Immunocore Holdings plc
business: We are a commercial stage biotechnology company pioneering and delivering transformative immunomodulating medicines to radically improve outcomes for patients with cancer, infectious diseases, and autoimmune diseases. In 2022, we received approval for our lead product, KIMMTRAK, for the treatment of unresectable or metastatic uveal melanoma ("mUM") from the FDA, the European Commission and other health authorities. KIMMTRAK is now approved in 39 countries and the Company has commercially launched the product in 30 countries, including the United States, Germany and France, among other territories.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial stage biotechnology company pioneering and delivering transformative immunomodulating medicines to radically improve outcomes for patients with cancer, infectious diseases, and autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in TEBE-AM Phase 3 trial for advanced cutaneous melanoma
catalysts.sentence: We expect the Phase 3 trial to complete patient enrollment in the first half of 2026 with topline data expected as early as the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from TEBE-AM Phase 3 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect the Phase 3 trial to complete patient enrollment in the first half of 2026 with topline data expected as early as the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in ATOM Phase 3 trial for adjuvant uveal melanoma
catalysts.sentence: We expect the Phase 3 trial to complete enrollment in 2028.

catalysts.event: Present data from brenetafusp Phase 1/2 trial in ovarian and lung cancer
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present data from this trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present data from IMC-P115C Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present data from this trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present initial data from IMC-R117C Phase 1/2 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present initial data from this trial in 2027.

catalysts.event: Report additional MAD data from STRIVE trial for HIV
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report additional MAD data from the STRIVE trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Begin Phase 1 trial for IMC-S118AI in type 1 diabetes
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin the Phase 1 clinical trial in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: File CTA or IND for IMC-U120AI in atopic dermatitis
catalysts.sentence: We plan to file a CTA or IND in the second half of 2026 for a Phase 1 trial in atopic dermatitis.
